name: Steward
description: Autonomous superagent — code analysis, task execution, CI automation, cross-repo healing, federation bridge

skills.name: Code Analysis
skills.description: AST-based code analysis, cohesion metrics, dead code detection, dependency scanning

skills.name: Task Execution
skills.description: Execute delegated tasks: bug fixes, refactoring, feature implementation with autonomous PR creation
examples: Fix failing CI in repo X

skills.name: CI Automation
skills.description: Monitor CI pipelines, diagnose failures, propose fixes
examples: Check CI status for repo X

skills.name: Cross-Repo Diagnostic
skills.description: Diagnose health of federation peers across repositories

skills.name: PR Review
skills.description: Review pull requests: blast radius analysis, CI check, author trust verification

skills.name: Self-Healing
skills.description: Diagnose and fix code issues via AST surgery with Hebbian learning

github_token.description: GitHub personal access token for API authentication
